title: Olaatmon
description: A Datapack for Cobblemon containing Pokemon spawned from /vp/'s /OLAATG/, One Line At A Time General.
body:
A datapack for Cobblemon that adds 20 new Pokémon to the game:

<details>
<summary>Olaatmon List</summary>

**Olaat** Dark type, a simple black worm that can evolve into any Olaatmon.

**Dewy** the Grass type starter of the pack and its 2 evolutions.

**Extraqua** the Water type starter of the pack and its 2 evolutions.

**Furmite** the Fire Type starter of the pack and its 2 evolutions.

**Daislet** Grass type, a piglet that has a flower on it's head.

**Bitery** Electric type, a Pokemon with a big maw and battery teeth.

**Mardore** Normal/Fairy type, a friendly creature who has a marble on it's back that changes color depending on how deep its bond with its trainer is.

**Curgull** Water/Flying type, a rather clownish bird with many tricks up it's wing.

**Curgull** Dragon/Bug type, the scourge of all deserts.

**Fatefin** Water/Fairy type, two fish destined to be together to the bitter end.

**Mawlaxy** Psychic/Steel type, a transcendent being living among the stars.

**Angetraz** Fairy/Rock type, a harpist swan chained to a malicious rock.

**Paladeath** Ghost/Electric type, the spirit of a holy warrior that still wander this world.

**Magnumboros** Fire type, only a master alchemist can have this Olaatmon as their partner.

</details>

The Pokémon included in this pack are based on the drawings made by the anons at the One Line At A Time General (/OLAATG/) on 4chan.

The quality of the mons (competitively and visually) may vary due to this being the first datapack I have ever made for Cobblemon. But if you want to see random imageboard creations brought to life in Minecraft, then this is the datapack for you.

Note that you won't be able to select the Olaat starters when you join a new world due to current limitations in Cobblemon. To get the starters you will need to evolve a level 5 or higher "Olaat" into one of them by giving it the appropriate evolution item. (oak leaves for grass, shears for water, and furnace for fire)

The evolution methods for all Olaatmon can be found in the manual.txt file that comes with the datapack.

More Pokemon may be added to this pack in the future.
